items.final_wording: Supports documenting tube status, caregiver concerns, otorrhoea, clinician-completed education, examination, and periodic follow-up. Procedure and medication recommendations are excluded.

source.title: Clinical Practice Guideline: Tympanostomy Tubes in Children (Update)
source.jurisdiction: United States specialty guideline; international evidence requiring UAE paediatric ENT, audiology, procedure, and referral adaptation
source.population: Children aged 6 months to 12 years with tympanostomy tubes or being considered for tubes for otitis media.
source.setting: Any care setting involved in paediatric otitis-media assessment or tympanostomy-tube follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for child age, recurrent infection and effusion history, hearing, symptoms, risk factors, audiology, tube education, otorrhoea, examination, and routine clinician-led follow-up. It does not authorize insertion, drops, antibiotics, or a procedure decision.

items.rationale: The exact tube follow-up statements support interval change, functional or hearing impact, otorrhoea and associated or negative features, caregiver concerns, clinician-performed ENT examination, hearing results, entered plan, safety net, questions, and follow-up without generating drops or a procedure.

added_items.final_wording: Supports documenting tube status, caregiver concerns, otorrhoea, clinician-completed education, examination, and periodic follow-up. Procedure and medication recommendations are excluded.

source.title: Clinical Practice Guideline: Tympanostomy Tubes in Children (Update)
source.jurisdiction: United States specialty guideline; international evidence requiring UAE paediatric ENT, audiology, procedure, and referral adaptation
source.population: Children aged 6 months to 12 years with tympanostomy tubes or being considered for tubes for otitis media.
source.setting: Any care setting involved in paediatric otitis-media assessment or tympanostomy-tube follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for child age, recurrent infection and effusion history, hearing, symptoms, risk factors, audiology, tube education, otorrhoea, examination, and routine clinician-led follow-up. It does not authorize insertion, drops, antibiotics, or a procedure decision.

exact_location.heading: Key action statements 10–16 — education, otorrhoea, water exposure, adenoid context, and follow-up

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting tube status, caregiver concerns, otorrhoea, clinician-completed education, examination, and periodic follow-up. Procedure and medication recommendations are excluded.

added_items.rationale: The exact tube follow-up statements support interval change, functional or hearing impact, otorrhoea and associated or negative features, caregiver concerns, clinician-performed ENT examination, hearing results, entered plan, safety net, questions, and follow-up without generating drops or a procedure.
